manifests.contents:
[package]
name = "fayls"
edition = "2024"
version = "0.0.1"
authors = ["muxcmux <storm.bg@gmail.com>"]
default-run = "fayls"

[dependencies]
anyhow = "1"
base64-turbo = "0.1"
config = "0.15"
epub = "2"
form_urlencoded = "1.2"
futures-util = "0.3"
glob-match = "0.2"
maud = "0.27"
multimap = "0.10"
pdf_oxide = "0.3"
rand = "0.10"
subtle = "2"
tempfile = "3"
thiserror = "2"
tokio-stream = "0.1"
tracing = "0.1"
walkdir = "2"

[dependencies.dotext]
git = "https://github.com/anvie/dotext.git"
rev = "06b1600"

[dependencies.notify-debouncer-full]
version = "0.8.0-rc.2"
features = ["tokio"]

[dependencies.salvo]
version = "0.93"
features = ["affix-state", "caching-headers", "compression", "sse", "session"]

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1"
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.sqlx]
version = "0.9"
features = ["sqlite", "runtime-tokio", "migrate"]

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1"
features = ["macros", "signal", "fs", "process"]

[dependencies.tokio-util]
version = "0.7"
features = ["rt"]

[dependencies.tracing-subscriber]
version = "0.3"
features = ["env-filter"]

[[bin]]
path = "src/bin/extractor.rs"
name = "extractor"
edition = "2024"
required-features = []

[[bin]]
path = "src/main.rs"
name = "fayls"
edition = "2024"
required-features = []

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"
name = "fayls"
edition = "2024"
required-features = []
crate-type = ["lib"]

[profile.release]
lto = true

[profile.release.package]

skeleton.lock_file:
version = 4
